changeDescription: BaseAnnotationManager: Number of type parameters changed. Before: "" After: "T" (required)
reason: Parameterized on the platform-interface type so subclasses use super.impl forwarding without holding a duplicate _impl field. Bound: T extends BaseAnnotationManagerPlatformInterface.
@protected typed getter exposing the private _impl to subclass wrappers in different files — Dart library-private fields aren't accessible across files even in the same package.

changeDescription: PointAnnotationManager: Super Type changed from "BaseAnnotationManager" to "BaseAnnotationManager<PointAnnotationManagerPlatformInterface>"
reason: Companion to the BaseAnnotationManager generic parameter addition. Customer code referencing PointAnnotationManager compiles unchanged.

changeDescription: CircleAnnotationManager: Super Type changed from "BaseAnnotationManager" to "BaseAnnotationManager<CircleAnnotationManagerPlatformInterface>"
reason: Companion to the BaseAnnotationManager generic parameter addition.

changeDescription: PolygonAnnotationManager: Super Type changed from "BaseAnnotationManager" to "BaseAnnotationManager<PolygonAnnotationManagerPlatformInterface>"
reason: Companion to the BaseAnnotationManager generic parameter addition.

changeDescription: PolylineAnnotationManager: Super Type changed from "BaseAnnotationManager" to "BaseAnnotationManager<PolylineAnnotationManagerPlatformInterface>"
reason: Companion to the BaseAnnotationManager generic parameter addition.

Vestigial supertype: v2.23 declared `MapboxMap extends ChangeNotifier` but had zero `notifyListeners()` call sites. Customer code observing it was already a silent no-op.
Inherited via ChangeNotifier; see ChangeNotifier removal reason.

Relocated to packages/mapbox_maps_flutter/lib/src/camera_state_extensions.dart. Customer code calling `cameraState.toCameraOptions()` through `package:mapbox_maps_flutter/mapbox_maps_flutter.dart` continues to compile; dart-apitool flags the class because the declared library URI changed.
Previously-unused `static CameraState fromJson(...)` dropped during the Conversion extension's relocation (no callers in any package at lift time).

v2 was a thin `turf.Feature` wrapper with encode()/decode() helpers for Pigeon serialization. Constructor surface preserved via the re-exported `package:turf/turf.dart`; the encode/decode helpers were Pigeon-internal plumbing, not customer surface.
Renamed: `StyleLayer` -> `Layer`, `StyleSource` -> `Source`. Class shape preserved on the new names; customers update import names.
Renamed: `StyleLayer` -> `Layer`, `StyleSource` -> `Source`. Class shape preserved on the new names; customers update import names.
`bind()` parameter type changed from `StyleManager` to `StylePlatformInterface` after the federated split. Method is now `@internal`; use `mapboxMap.style.addSource(source)` instead.

`Source` gained a required `style` field to resolve source references when sources are passed by value through `StyleManager.addSource`. Typed `Source` subclasses set this field automatically.
Pigeon `@HostApi` for in-process key-value storage; mobile-internal in the federated layout. No federated facade equivalent; use `shared_preferences` for portable persistent storage.

Pigeon `FlutterApi` listener internal to the mobile platform-channel transport; replaced by the typed `onMapTapListener` / `onMapLongTapListener` / `onMapScrollListener` / `onMapZoomListener` setter properties on `MapboxMap`.

Pigeon `FlutterApi` listener internal to mobile; replaced by typed listener params on `MapboxMapsFlutterPlatform.createSnapshotter` (`onStyleLoadedListener`, `onMapLoadErrorListener`, `onStyleDataLoadedListener`, `onStyleImageMissingListener`).

`MapRecorder` API uses named parameters (`timeWindow`, `loggingEnabled`, `compressed`; `playbackCount`, `playbackSpeedMultiplier`, `avoidPlaybackPauses`) instead of option struct types. Mobile constructs the Pigeon options at the wire boundary.

Pigeon-emitted codec scaffolding never referenced by any v2.23 public API. Reachability through `part of mapbox_maps_flutter` was an accidental consequence of Pigeon's monolithic-package output, not a deliberate customer surface — no v2 call site lost.

changeDescription: MapboxMap: coordinatesForPixels: Type of parameter "pixels" changed. List<ScreenCoordinate?> -> List<ScreenCoordinate>
reason: Lifted Pigeon-imposed nullability now that the platform interface is decoupled from Pigeon.

changeDescription: AnnotationManager: removeAnnotationManager: Type of parameter "manager" changed. BaseAnnotationManager -> BaseAnnotationManager<BaseAnnotationManagerPlatformInterface>
reason: Companion to the BaseAnnotationManager generic parameter addition.
